case_title: GAYLORD SUITES VS. ACHARA HAIRE et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD SUITES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HAIRE, ACHARA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAYLORD SUITES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIRE, ACHARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 620 JONES ST., #607, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
